items.claim: Jared Cannonier has the ability to weather the storm and pour it on in the third round.
items.quote: Jared's going to pour it on round three like he did in the G-rod fight by weathering the storm

items.claim: Gregory Rodriguez has historically poor striking defense and is prone to gassing out.
items.quote: Gregory's always been like gassy. He's been a lack of defense and he has way more openings.

items.claim: Chase Hooper has consistently failed to improve his striking defense.
items.quote: this kid that has just continuously shown that he has not learned striking defense.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has low experience and has been finished in all three of his professional losses.
items.quote: He's low experience and has been finished in all three of his losses.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez demonstrated the ability to defend against deep rear-naked choke attempts in previous fights.
items.quote: Mitch fought off a deep rear naked from Thiago Moyes and in the the following fight and ends up getting knocked out um instead of submitted.
